_comment: Expected (published) oracle values for Stardust SRC PICA-X case.
_references: Covington et al. (2009) JSR 45-4 — total recession ~5 mm
Poteet et al. — bondline temperature well below 250°C structural limit

peak_surface_temp_K._note: Published stagnation surface temperature at peak heating; 1-D model accuracy ±10%

total_recession_mm._note: Published total ablative recession depth for Stardust SRC PICA heat shield

max_bondline_temp_K._note: Bondline must stay below 250°C (523.15 K) for structural integrity
